reviews.review_description: The graphics the tycoon, the cosmetics the games were so dog water don't get this game unless if you like all these goofy stuff and bad graphics stuff so this game was so bad. I deleted it when I first saw it good thing about this game. Is the front cover the favorite part of the game when I deleted it

This is a beautiful game. You should really check it out. I give it five stars. The owner even gave me a head mod. It’s really cool. There’s gonna be a tag mode and a hunt mode and a horror mode. It’s gonna be so cool. I cannot wait to see your faces out there and see people playing it with me. It’s just gonna be really cool. I really suggest playing this before early access is not here anymore so yeah, join it
It is a great game and great people and if you see a mod or co owner kicking people for fun report them
Co owner Jerome kept kicking me and kicked someone else because they moved also owner deleted my other review😡😡😡

Not to be annoying but moderator or content creator would be amazing. I'm going to help the community if anything bad happens and upload alot of videos channel is ItsJustPey btw. This game is still developing and growing its community so don't be harsh on this developing game. 5 stars I recommend.
Best game ever staff is nice so yeah 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Haven't played so I hope it's good
